name: mcp-code-execution
description: Token-efficient MCP server interaction through code execution. Reduces context usage by 95-99% through progressive tool disclosure and in-environment processing.

commands.name: setup-mcp
commands.description: Initialize an MCP code execution workspace with configuration and directory structure

commands.name: generate-wrappers
commands.description: Automatically generate Python and TypeScript wrappers for configured MCP servers

commands.name: list-skills
commands.description: Show all registered skills with descriptions, tags, and dependencies

commands.name: create-skill
commands.description: Create a reusable skill pattern from successful task solutions

commands.name: validate-config
commands.description: Check MCP server configuration for errors and connectivity

agents.name: mcp-task-executor
agents.description: Execute token-efficient tasks using MCP servers with automatic data processing and summarization

skills.name: extract-action-items
skills.description: Extract action items from text based on configurable prefixes (ACTION:, TODO:, FOLLOW-UP:)

skills.name: filter-large-dataset
skills.description: Efficiently filter large datasets in-environment without loading into context

workspaceDirectory.description: Root directory for code execution and file operations

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retries for failed tool calls

requestTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for MCP server requests

enableMetrics.description: Enable performance metrics collection and reporting

enableSecurityPolicies.description: Enable security policies (workspace isolation, rate limiting, input validation)

rateLimitCallsPerMinute.description: Maximum tool calls per minute per server

autoSkillDiscovery.description: Automatically discover and register new skills
